description: §41 — a `use scrml:ui` in the file preamble (before any markup, outside any `${ }`) is the correct placement; E-USE-001 stays silent.
rationale: §41: a top-level `use scrml:ui` is the canonical form. E-USE-001 fires only for `use` inside a `${ }` logic block; a preamble `use` must not fire.
